title: Nashtah Gang
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Nashtah}}
[[File:Nashtah_Gang.png|thumb|right|250px|The Nashtah Gang.]]
The '''Nashtah Gang''' was a gang on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the early days of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. They indirectly worked for [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] and the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]]. The gang was sent to assault [[Kodo Finn]] but before they could do so [[Ekria/Legends|Ekria]], [[Zonder/Legends|Zonder]] and [[Drake Lo'gaan/Legends|Drake Lo'gaan]] foiled their plans by protecting Finn. The trio of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] then routed the gang.
